title: Earthquake Safety 地震避险
scene: 教室里突然发生地震，Teacher指导学生避险。

lines.en: Everyone, get under your desks right now!
lines.zh: 大家，马上躲到桌子下面！

lines.en: I am scared! Should I run outside?
lines.zh: 我好害怕！我要跑出去吗？

lines.en: No! Stay under the desk. Protect your head.
lines.zh: 不要！待在桌子下面。保护头部。

lines.en: I am using my backpack to cover my head.
Good girl. Stay away from the windows.
Is it getting stronger or weaker?
lines.zh: 震动是变强了还是变弱了？

lines.en: It is stopping now. Stay calm, everyone.
lines.zh: 现在快停了。大家保持冷静。

lines.en: Can we go out now, Teacher?
lines.zh: 老师，我们现在可以出去吗？

lines.en: Yes. Line up and walk out slowly. Do not run.
lines.zh: 可以。排队慢慢走出去。不要跑。
